persona.name: Raj Sharma
persona.lifestyle: Family-oriented, luxury traveler, high-income software engineer
persona.family: Wife Anita, Son Aryan (12, mild asthma), Daughter Priya (9)
health_concerns: Family cardiac history requiring stress testing (€800-1200/year)
persona.budget_range: High budget (€985/month current spend, willing to pay for quality)
persona.travel_frequency: Very frequent business travel (87 days/year) + luxury family vacations
current_issues: High deductibles problematic for family (recent €380 out-of-pocket)
Business travel coverage gaps (20% co-pay at non-network hospitals)
Children's activities requiring enhanced coverage (skiing, dance competitions)
High-value possessions (€3,500 cooking equipment, €2,800 books, €4,200 office)
Cardiac care requiring specialized coverage (€800-1200/year stress testing)
